2606.07181.title: RETROSPECT: RETROsynthesis via Sequential Prediction, and Chemically Transformed-ranking
2606.07181.paper_summary: Single-step retrosynthesis needs both accurate first-ranked suggestions and candidate lists that are rich enough for downstream selection. We study this as a proposal-selection decomposition. Our system, RETROSPECT, combines a single Transformer proposal model, which we call the ChemAlign Transformer, with a LambdaMART reranker over structural, reaction-template, upstream-score, and optional DFT-derived descriptors. The generator is trained with hybrid root-aligned and random SMILES augmentation, Pre-LayerNorm, tied embeddings, exponential moving average weights, and a differentiable atom-balance auxiliary loss. On the full USPTO-50K test set of 5,007 reactions, the generator reaches 55.00% top-1 and 86.18% top-10 exact-match accuracy with 99.86% top-1 validity. On the merged candidate-pool benchmark used for reranking, which contains 5,007 test products and about 111 candidates per product, a LambdaMART model trained on the structural feature set reaches 59.4% top-1 with 0.7171 mean reciprocal rank. Feature ablations show that upstream proposal score and template-frequency statistics provide most of the reranking signal, while DFT and reaction-center DFT features provide smaller and less consistent gains. These results support a modular view of retrosynthesis: stronger single-model proposal and learned candidate selection are complementary, and the proposal model can serve as a drop-in component for ensemble systems such as RetroChimera (Maziarz et al., 2024)
2606.07181.paper_summary_zh: 單步逆合成需要準確的首選建議和足夠豐富的候選列表以供下游選擇。我們將此研究為提案選擇分解。我們的系統 RETROSPECT 結合了一個單一的 Transformer 提案模型，我們稱之為 ChemAlign Transformer，以及一個基於結構、反應模板、上游分數和可選的 DFT 衍生描述符的 LambdaMART 重新排序器。生成器使用混合的根對齊和隨機 SMILES 擴增進行訓練，並採用預層正規化、綁定嵌入、指數移動平均權重和可微分的原子平衡輔助損失。在包含 5,007 個反應的完整 USPTO-50K 測試集上，生成器達到了 55.00% 的 top-1 和 86.18% 的 top-10 精確匹配準確率，且 top-1 的有效性為 99.86%。在用於重新排序的合併候選池基準上，該基準包含 5,007 個測試產品和每個產品約 111 個候選者，基於結構特徵集訓練的 LambdaMART 模型達到了 59.4% 的 top-1 和 0.7171 的平均倒數排名。特徵消融顯示，上游提案分數和模板頻率統計提供了大部分的重新排序信號，而 DFT 和反應中心 DFT 特徵則提供了較小且不一致的增益。這些結果支持逆合成的模塊化觀點：更強的單模型提案和學習的候選選擇是互補的，並且提案模型可以作為像 RetroChimera (Maziarz et al., 2024) 這樣的集成系統的即插即用組件。
2606.07181.author: Raja Sekhar Pappala et.al.
2606.07181.authors: Raja Sekhar Pappala, Shreyas Vinaya Sathyanarayana, Ronit Kumar Choudhary, Arjun Verma, Deepak Warrier
